hero.headline: Explore the World,
hero.subtext: Handcrafted journeys across Central Asia and beyond — designed for the curious, the bold, and the discerning traveller.

home.featuredToursSubtext: From the ancient Silk Road cities of Uzbekistan to the peaks of Kyrgyzstan — every journey is personally crafted.
home.whySubtext: We don't sell packages. We design experiences — bespoke, personal, and unforgettable.
home.why1Text: Every trip is built from scratch around your interests, pace, and travel style.
home.why2Text: Our team has lived and breathed Central Asia for over a decade.
home.why3Text: From booking to return — we're always one message away.
home.why4Text: Hundreds of satisfied travellers have rated us 4.9 stars on average.
home.ctaText: Tell us where you want to go. We'll take care of the rest.

tours.pageSubtext: Discover our curated collection of extraordinary journeys.
tours.noTours: No tours found in this category.

about.label: Our Story
about.title:
Born in Tashkent,
Built for the World
about.p1: Sayohat (Uzbek for 'journey') was founded in 2012 by a team of passionate travellers who believed that Central Asia deserved to be seen — truly seen — by the world.
about.p2: We started with a single Silk Road itinerary. Today we operate over 40 tours across 12 countries, each one as personal and precise as the first.
about.p3: Our philosophy is simple: travel should change you. We build every journey to do exactly that.

contact.pageSubtext: Ready to plan your next adventure? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.label: Contact Us
contact.title: Let's Plan Your Journey
contact.messageLabel: Tell Us About Your Dream Trip
contact.successText: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.telegramCta: Or reach us instantly on Telegram

footer.tagline: Tashkent's boutique travel studio — crafting unforgettable journeys since 2012.
